page_metadata.biotools__summary: NRGTEN (Najmanovich Research Group Toolkit for Elastic Networks) is an extensible Python toolkit for coarse-grained normal mode analysis of proteins, nucleic acids, small molecules and their complexes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: NRGTEN (Najmanovich Research Group Toolkit for Elastic Networks) is an extensible Python toolkit for coarse-grained normal mode analysis of proteins, nucleic acids, small molecules and their complexes.
